chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 709 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 18-10-2022 None present for the petitioner. It appears that on the last date of hearing i.e. 13-04-2021, learned Counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of instant petition; however, today learned Counsel for the petitioner is not in attendance. It appears that the petitioner, who is resident of District Shaheed Benazirabad, through instant petition, has challenged the appointment of respondent No.8 as Police Constable posted at Hyderabad. The matter does not pertain within the territorial jurisdiction of this Bench; hence, this petition, being not maintainable in law, is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
